basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026: Tezpur University has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./M.Tech./Integrated M.Tech./M.Sc. in listed Food Engineering/Technology/Biotechnology fields, GATE or NET (UGC/CSIR/ICAR) or equivalent national level examination qualified
qualification.details: B.Tech./M.Tech./Integrated M.Tech./M.Sc. in Food Process Engineering/Food Engineering and Technology/Food Engineering/Food Technology/Food Technology and Biochemical Engineering/Food Biotechnology/Food Science/Food Science and Technology/Food Science and Nutrition/Food Technology and Management/Food Process Engineering and Management/Food Plant Operations and Management/Food Safety and Quality Management/Post Harvest Technology/Food Processing and Preservation/Food Process Technology/Agricultural Engineering/Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering. Must have qualified GATE or NET (UGC/CSIR/ICAR) including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

selection_process: peer-reviewed publications Personal Interview in blended mode
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tezpur University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./M.Tech./Integrated M.Tech./M.Sc. in specific Food Engineering/Technology/Biotechnology fields and must have qualified GATE or NET.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on shortlisting of academic credentials, experience, GATE/NET qualifications, publications, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the project for which the Junior Research Fellow will be appointed?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 25th March 2029.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is DoRD/FET/NS/20-632/141-A.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode will the interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The personal interview will be conducted in a blended mode.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Tezpur University located?
faq.answer: Tezpur University is located in Tezpur, Assam, with the pincode 784028.
